eta-coefficient-barrier.summary: Parked frontier marker: c=3 leading coeff of eta(C_p^3)<=3p^2 (BSP 2017) pins C_53 at 4 via sup at n=p*q; only an unconditional sub-3p^2 eta for all large p moves it. No build.

global-induction-list-fold.last_note: Verified: global factorization induction (List fold of recursion_step over base_in_form) + acc_cast_bridge + c53_le_4_per_n compile green (genuine recompile), axioms clean [propext,Classical.choice,Quot.sound] (bridge [propext]), no sorryAx/no problem-axiom. Algebra re-derived (0 violations), hypotheses non-vacuous (concrete witness). Conditional re-derivation of C_53<=4; held stays 4 (infrastructure, not record-break). Carry-forward: tie ps to Nat.factors n + iSup packaging.
global-induction-list-fold.summary: Fold proved recursion_step over a List of prime factors (ℤ-accumulator + ℕ/ℤ cast bridge) to get D(C_n^3)<=4n-Q-2 for all n; reuses recursion_step+base_in_form verbatim. Lever-A infrastructure, conditional, does not move held off 4. Lean-fit (finite List induction).

lean-conditional-scaffold.last_note: Lean scaffold verified: lake build Constants green (Lean v4.31.0 / Mathlib fabf563), recursion_step + comparison_ineq fully proved, #print axioms clean (no sorryAx/problem axiom), algebra re-derived independently. Conditional re-derivation of recursion step only — held UNCHANGED at 4, no bound improvement. Next: lift to full factorization induction over prime multiset.
lean-conditional-scaffold.summary: Lean-formalize Grinsztajn's conditional induction; round-2 sub-goal = the N recursion lemma D(C_m^3)<=4m-Q-2 & p<=Q => D(C_pm^3)<=4pm-Q-2, axiomatizing the zero-sum inputs (re-derives C_53<=4 conditionally; lake-build certified).

multiset-induction-variant.summary: More faithful factorization fold over Nat.factors/Multiset, tying ps to the actual prime multiset of n with Q=P(n)=largest prime factor. Heavier Mathlib factorization API; follow-on to the List fold, not a parallel build this round. Lean-fit but a one-round stretch.
